## Definition of done (the feature is documented when all are linked)

- [ ] **Front-End** — components validated vs. code (+ Code Connect where relevant)
- [ ] **Back-End** — entities, statuses/transitions, permissions, rules documented
- [ ] **Test** — test scenarios / acceptance criteria written
